examples.title: Paxos Consensus
examples.description: Basic consensus algorithm for replicated logs
examples.code:
PROPOSER:
 1. Prepare(n)
 2. Receive promises
 3. Accept(n, value)

ACCEPTOR:
 1. Respond to prepare with highest seen proposal
 2. Accept if n >= current promise
examples.explanation: Two-phase protocol to achieve consensus in async networks
